name: fuel-session-policy-sdk
description: TypeScript-first Fuel Session Policy SDK monorepo

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @idoa/fuel-session-policy-shared && npm run build --workspace @idoa/fuel-session-policy-sdk && npm run build --workspace @idoa/fuel-session-policy-demo-app
scripts.ci:check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
